hero_index: Private VPN access for Singapore and UK.
hero_kicker: Private VPN access for invited members.
hero_subtitle: Currently supporting Singapore and United Kingdom VPN locations, with safer access for public Wi-Fi, travel, and everyday browsing.
locations_text: UNITEDVPN currently supports Singapore and United Kingdom VPN locations. Download the config file for the location you want to use, then activate the matching WireGuard profile.
locations_singapore_instruction: Use UNITEDVPN Singapore to connect through Singapore.
locations_uk_instruction: Use UNITEDVPN UK to connect through the United Kingdom.
why_text: UnitedVPN provides simple, responsible VPN access for invited members.
principle_belonging_text: Access is reserved for approved members inside a trusted private network.
principle_approval_text: Membership begins with review, not automatic entry.
principle_loyalty_text: One approved member. One trusted device. Access can be revoked when necessary.
step_request_text: Request invite-only membership and VPN access.
step_connect_text: Download the config for your VPN location, then activate the matching WireGuard profile.
benefit_private_access_text: Choose Singapore or UK as your VPN location.
benefit_secure_onboarding_text: Connect with WireGuard config downloads and QR setup.
benefit_admin_controlled_text: Access can be approved or revoked.
benefit_no_public_access_text: Only invited and approved members can use VPN profiles.
benefit_minimal_text: No ads. No upsells. No noise.
privacy_text: UnitedVPN does not promise complete anonymity. It helps reduce IP exposure, adds a layer of privacy on public Wi-Fi, and gives invited members simple private VPN access.
privacy_public_wifi_text: Adds a protection layer on cafe, hotel, airport, and shared networks.
privacy_ip_text: Routes traffic through the VPN server to help keep your real IP address less exposed.
privacy_locations_text: Select either Singapore or United Kingdom profiles from the dashboard.
privacy_invited_text: Operated through approval-based access instead of public signup.
privacy_wireguard_text: Add your VPN profile through a download or QR code without complex setup.
